title: Bluff: History Misconceptions
description: One answer is fake — can you spot the bluff?

questions.question: Who was the first President of the United States?
questions.explanation: George Washington served as the first US President from 1789 to 1797.

questions.question: Which ancient wonder still exists today?
questions.explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only ancient wonder still largely intact.

questions.question: Who painted the Mona Lisa?
questions.explanation: Da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa between 1503 and 1519.

questions.question: Which empire was the largest in history by land area?
questions.explanation: The British Empire covered about 35.5 million km² at its peak.

questions.question: Who invented the light bulb for commercial use?
questions.explanation: Edison developed the first commercially practical incandescent light bulb in 1879.

questions.question: Which country was the first to give women the right to vote?
questions.explanation: New Zealand granted women suffrage in 1893.

questions.question: What was the shortest war in history?
questions.explanation: The Anglo-Zanzibar War lasted only 38-45 minutes on August 27, 1896.

questions.question: Who wrote the Communist Manifesto?
questions.explanation: Marx and Engels co-authored it, but Marx is the primary credited author.

questions.question: Which civilization built Machu Picchu?
questions.explanation: The Inca built Machu Picchu around 1450 AD as an estate for Emperor Pachacuti.

questions.question: What was the first country to land on the Moon?
questions.explanation: The USA's Apollo 11 mission landed on the Moon on July 20, 1969.

questions.question: Who discovered penicillin?
questions.explanation: Fleming discovered penicillin in 1928 from a mold contaminating his lab.

questions.question: Which wall divided Berlin during the Cold War?
questions.explanation: The Berlin Wall divided East and West Berlin from 1961 to 1989.

questions.question: Who was the last pharaoh of ancient Egypt?
questions.explanation: Cleopatra VII was the last active ruler of the Ptolemaic Kingdom of Egypt.

questions.question: Which treaty ended World War I?
questions.explanation: The Treaty of Versailles was signed on June 28, 1919.

questions.question: Who was the first person to circumnavigate the globe?
questions.explanation: Magellan's expedition (completed by Elcano) was the first to circumnavigate Earth in 1522.
